highlights.name: International Gadget Insurance
highlights.description: Insurance coverage for personal electronic devices such as smartphones and laptops against theft, damage, or loss during international travel.

highlights.name: Real-Time Travel Expense Tracking
highlights.description: A tool that categorizes and tracks travel spending across multiple currencies to help users manage their travel budgets.

highlights.name: Destination Currency Alerts
highlights.description: A notification system that alerts users about favorable exchange rates for currencies related to their travel destinations.

International Insurances.name: International Travel Insurance
International Insurances.description: Short-term travel coverage that protects users against medical emergencies, trip disruptions, and unexpected incidents while traveling abroad.

International Insurances.name: International Gadget Insurance
International Insurances.description: Insurance coverage for personal electronic devices such as smartphones and laptops against theft, damage, or loss during international travel.

International Insurances.name: Freelancer Liability Insurance
International Insurances.description: Professional liability coverage designed for freelancers and remote workers operating internationally, protecting against claims related to services provided.

Travel & Mobility.name: Airport Lounge Access Subscriptions
Travel & Mobility.description: Subscription-based access to airport lounges worldwide, providing travelers with comfortable waiting areas, Wi-Fi, and amenities before flights.

Travel & Mobility.name: International Travel Booking
Travel & Mobility.description: A service that allows users to search, book, and pay for flights and hotels globally using their Sidus wallet.

Travel & Mobility.name: Local Transportation Passes
Travel & Mobility.description: Digital passes for metro, train, bus, or city mobility systems that travelers can purchase directly within the app.

Travel & Mobility.name: Car Rental Booking
Travel & Mobility.description: A platform to search, reserve, and pay for rental vehicles in cities around the world using the Sidus wallet.

Travel & Mobility.name: Real-Time Travel Expense Tracking
Travel & Mobility.description: A tool that categorizes and tracks travel spending across multiple currencies to help users manage their travel budgets.

Travel & Mobility.name: Travel Rewards and Cashback
Travel & Mobility.description: A rewards program that offers cashback or points on international payments, travel bookings, and foreign currency spending.

Travel & Mobility.name: Destination Currency Alerts
Travel & Mobility.description: A notification system that alerts users about favorable exchange rates for currencies related to their travel destinations.

Partnerships.name: International Travel Booking
Partnerships.description: A service that allows users to search, book, and pay for flights and hotels worldwide directly through the Sidus app using their wallet balances.

Partnerships.name: Local Transportation Passes
Partnerships.description: Digital passes for metro, train, bus, and other urban mobility systems that users can purchase and store within the Sidus app.

Partnerships.name: Global eSIM Data Plans
Partnerships.description: Mobile data plans that users can activate instantly while traveling abroad, providing internet connectivity without needing a physical SIM card.

Partnerships.name: Health Insurance
Partnerships.description: International health coverage plans that provide medical protection for travelers, expatriates, and global workers.
